name: Basic Form
description: The starting point of Zac's biological evolution.

name: Enhanced Senses
description: Zac's nervous system becomes more sensitive, allowing him to detect movement, vibration, and sound more effectively.

name: Echolocation
description: Zac develops bat-like sound perception, allowing him to locate enemies through echoes. Unlocks Sonic Pulse.

name: Sonic Pulse Organ
description: Zac's sound-sensing organ mutates further, allowing him to release stronger sound waves that disrupt enemies.

name: Predator Reflex
description: Zac's senses connect directly to his muscles, improving his reaction speed like a hunting beast.

name: Swift Legs
description: Zac's legs mutate for faster movement and quicker combat reaction. Unlocks Beast Focus.

name: Hardened Body
description: Zac's body begins to toughen, preparing his skin and bones for defensive mutations.

name: Thick Hide
description: Zac's skin hardens like a wild beast, reducing damage from enemy attacks.

name: Bone Plating
description: Dense bone plates grow over Zac's body, forming a natural biological armor.

name: Predator Weapons
description: Zac's body begins adapting for close-range hunting by developing natural offensive structures.

name: Bone Claw
description: Sharp beast claws grow from Zac's hands, giving him stronger physical attacks.

name: Rending Talons
description: Zac's claws become longer and sharper, specialized for tearing through enemy defenses.

name: Venom Fang
description: Zac develops venomous fangs, allowing him to poison enemies through bite attacks. Unlocks Venom Bite.

name: Toxic Bite
description: Zac's venom glands become stronger, making his poison-based attacks more dangerous.
